title: Delicate Peppery American Parma Ham Sandwich
description: A romantic American dish featuring peppery parma ham and mushimono-steam, perfect for a special occasion, this nut-free-friendly sandwich is sure to impress.
instructions: Begin by preparing the mushimono-steam by boiling the water in a large pot.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and place a steamer basket over the pot.
Add the shaggy pepper lettuce to the steamer basket and cover with a lid.
Steam the lettuce for 2 minutes, or until it is slightly wilted.
Butter one side of each slice of white bread.
Spread mayonnaise on the unbuttered side of two slices of bread.
Add two slices of parma ham to each slice of bread with mayonnaise.
Top the parma ham with a spoonful of steamed lettuce and a sprinkle of black pepper.
Spread Dijon mustard on the unbuttered side of the remaining two slices of bread.
Place the slices of bread with Dijon mustard on top of the sandwiches to complete them.
